---
name: Vertical slice
about: One thin feature that runs end to end
title: "Slice: "
labels: slice
---

## Goal

One sentence. What exists when this slice is done that does not exist now?

## Definition of done

Observable and checkable. If a reviewer cannot verify it in two minutes, it is
not done — it is described.

## Out of scope

What you are deliberately not doing in this slice, so nobody — human or agent —
helpfully does it anyway.
